title: Authorized Web Application VAPT
description: Conducted a full-scope, authorized penetration test against a live web application following OWASP Testing Guide v4 methodology. Identified 3 high-severity and 5 medium-severity vulnerabilities including SQLi, XSS, and IDOR, and delivered a formal pentest report with CVSS v3.1-scored findings.

title: SafeLine Web Application Firewall
description: Set up a Damn Vulnerable Web Application (DVWA) and simulated SQL injection attacks against it, then deployed SafeLine WAF to detect and block those attacks. Configured rate limiting to prevent DoS flooding, and analysed WAF logs to interpret attack patterns and defensive responses.

title: Professional Portfolio
description: Built a personal professional portfolio website that showcases skills, experience, and projects. Features a dark cybersecurity aesthetic with animated particle backgrounds, glassmorphic UI, and fully responsive design.

title: Active Directory Attack Path Simulation
description: Simulated a real-world Active Directory compromise scenario in a lab environment, covering enumeration, Kerberoasting, Pass-the-Hash, and privilege escalation techniques. Documented the full attack chain and corresponding defensive mitigations.
